creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to bebyx from comment #7)

To answer this question more fully: tzdata updates are released 'as needed' by the timezone database maintainers.  Usually when future timestamps will become incorrect due to changes to DST in various places but sometimes for other reasons.  FreeBSD usually imports new versions of tzdata within a couple of days (and often within hours) of upstream releases.
